title: Sales Channels - Changing settings for DISH Payment

steps.caption: Welcome. This guide shows how to change the settings for DISH Payment.
In the Backoffice, go to Self-service and click Sales channels.
Click the edit (pencil) icon of your QR (Payment) sales channel.
On the Content tab, edit the Payment text shown to customers during DISH Payment.
Open the Tipping tab and switch on Tipping active to configure tips for DISH Payment.
Open the General menu (General → General) and click Send to transmit your changes.
